failure_reason: phase_06_gate failed on 3 deterministic predicates and 1 semantic predicate. (1) ethics_assessment_non_null: the ethics_assessment field in implementation_architecture.json is null, providing no ethics self-assessment statement as required by the gate condition. (2) ethics_self_assessment_statement_non_empty: self_assessment_statement cannot be evaluated because ethics_assessment is null. (3) instrument_sections_addressed_non_empty: instrument_sections_addressed is an empty array []; no instrument-mandated implementation sections are recorded. (4) instrument_sections_complete (semantic): with an empty instrument_sections_addressed array it is impossible to confirm that all mandatory RIA instrument sections have been addressed; the requirement is structurally unverifiable.
tier_authority_applied: CLAUDE.md §6 (phase gate conditions are mandatory), §7 (Phase 6 gate: ethics flags explicitly stated, all instrument-mandated sections addressed, risk register populated), §12.4 (missing mandatory inputs trigger gate failure), §15 (prefer explicit gate failure over fabricated completion)
